query:
UPDATE candidates SET 
  education = '[{"degree": "MS Electrical Engineering", "institution": "Stanford University", "year": 2009}, {"degree": "BS Engineering", "institution": "Tsinghua University", "year": 2007}]',
  boardExposure = true,
  crossFunctionalExperience = '["Engineering", "Product Development", "Manufacturing", "R&D"]',
  geographicMobility = '["Shanghai", "Palo Alto", "Fremont", "Berlin"]',
  industryTransitions = '[{"from": "Consumer Electronics", "to": "Automotive/EV", "year": 2014}]',
  plantScaleExperience = true,
  evProgramCredential = true,
  notableProjects = '["Tesla Model 3 battery management system redesign", "Gigafactory Berlin production line setup", "Cross-platform EV architecture standardization"]',
  previousCompanies = '[{"company": "Apple", "role": "Senior Hardware Engineer", "years": 3}, {"company": "Tesla", "role": "Director of EV Engineering", "years": 8}]'
WHERE firstName = 'Alice' AND lastName = 'Chen';

UPDATE candidates SET 
  education = '[{"degree": "PhD Computer Science", "institution": "MIT", "year": 2014}, {"degree": "BS Computer Science", "institution": "UC Berkeley", "year": 2010}]',
  boardExposure = false,
  crossFunctionalExperience = '["Software Engineering", "AI/ML Research", "Product Management"]',
  geographicMobility = '["Mountain View", "New York", "London"]',
  industryTransitions = '[{"from": "Big Tech", "to": "Autonomous Vehicles", "year": 2019}]',
  plantScaleExperience = false,
  evProgramCredential = false,
  notableProjects = '["Google Waymo perception system", "AI-driven testing framework (40% bug reduction)", "Distributed systems architecture for autonomous fleet"]',
  previousCompanies = '[{"company": "Microsoft", "role": "Senior Software Engineer", "years": 2}, {"company": "Google/Waymo", "role": "VP Engineering", "years": 10}]'
WHERE firstName = 'Bob' AND lastName = 'Martinez';

UPDATE candidates SET 
  education = '[{"degree": "MBA", "institution": "University of Michigan", "year": 2016}, {"degree": "BS Industrial Engineering", "institution": "Purdue University", "year": 2012}]',
  boardExposure = false,
  crossFunctionalExperience = '["Manufacturing", "Quality Assurance", "Supply Chain", "Operations"]',
  geographicMobility = '["Detroit", "Louisville", "Cologne"]',
  industryTransitions = '[]',
  plantScaleExperience = true,
  evProgramCredential = false,
  notableProjects = '["Ford F-150 Lightning production line conversion", "Lean manufacturing rollout across 3 plants", "500K+ annual vehicle production management"]',
  previousCompanies = '[{"company": "General Motors", "role": "Plant Manager", "years": 4}, {"company": "Ford", "role": "Manufacturing Director", "years": 6}]'
WHERE firstName = 'Carol' AND lastName = 'Johnson';

UPDATE candidates SET 
  education = '[{"degree": "MS Computer Engineering", "institution": "Carnegie Mellon", "year": 2018}, {"degree": "BS Mechanical Engineering", "institution": "IIT Bombay", "year": 2014}]',
  boardExposure = true,
  crossFunctionalExperience = '["Engineering", "Product Strategy", "Fundraising", "Business Development"]',
  geographicMobility = '["Mumbai", "San Francisco", "Normal IL"]',
  industryTransitions = '[{"from": "Tech Startup", "to": "EV Startup", "year": 2018}]',
  plantScaleExperience = false,
  evProgramCredential = true,
  notableProjects = '["Rivian R1T end-to-end platform architecture", "Battery thermal management innovation (patent pending)", "Secured $5B funding based on technical roadmap"]',
  previousCompanies = '[{"company": "Qualcomm", "role": "Embedded Systems Engineer", "years": 2}, {"company": "Rivian", "role": "CTO / Co-founder", "years": 6}]'
WHERE firstName = 'David' AND lastName = 'Patel';

UPDATE candidates SET 
  education = '[{"degree": "Diplom-Ingenieur Mechanical Engineering", "institution": "RWTH Aachen", "year": 2010}, {"degree": "Executive MBA", "institution": "WHU Otto Beisheim", "year": 2018}]',
  boardExposure = true,
  crossFunctionalExperience = '["Engineering", "Program Management", "Manufacturing", "Strategy", "Government Relations"]',
  geographicMobility = '["Munich", "Leipzig", "Spartanburg SC", "Oxford UK", "Shenyang"]',
  industryTransitions = '[]',
  plantScaleExperience = true,
  evProgramCredential = true,
  notableProjects = '["BMW i3/i8 development program lead", "iX production launch at Dingolfing plant", "BMW EV engineering center of excellence establishment", "Cross-plant production standardization initiative"]',
  previousCompanies = '[{"company": "BMW", "role": "Various (Engineer to SVP)", "years": 14}]'
WHERE firstName = 'Eve' AND lastName = 'Schmidt';
